documentation.description: These are the supported ClickBoard shields

simple_types.name: Kind
simple_types.code:
TYPE Kind IS
(None,
 PiClick1,
 PiClick2,
 PiClick3,
 PiClick4,
 BeagleBoneClick2,
 BeagleBoneClick4,
 PocketBeagle,
 BeaglePlay,
 Unknown);

enumeration_literals.name: PiClick1
enumeration_literals.description: Raspberry Pi with MIKROE-1513/1512, with 1 socket

enumeration_literals.name: PiClick2
enumeration_literals.description: Raspberry Pi with MIKROE-1879, with 2 sockets

enumeration_literals.name: PiClick3
enumeration_literals.description: Raspberry Pi with MIKROE-2756, with 2 sockets

enumeration_literals.name: PiClick4
enumeration_literals.description: Raspberry Pi 4 or 5 with MIKROE-4122, with 3 sockets
